positive: A whimsical and ethereal depiction of a giant celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) with nine flowing, iridescent tails. The fox is poised in a meditative, elegant stance, surrounded by floating bioluminescent cherry blossoms and abstract constellations. The silhouette should be clean and stylized, suitable for high-contrast apparel printing. Focus on deep sapphire blues, vibrant magenta, and glowing gold accents. Use an art style blending Japanese ink wash (Sumi-e) with modern mystical line art. The composition must be centered, utilizing negative space effectively to make the subject pop.
negative: blur, text, signature, logo, watermark, copyright, artifact, noise, poor quality, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low contrast, dirty, graffiti
